hook.text: The West Bank has been under Israeli military occupation since 1967.

buildup.text: Palestinians seek a state there. Israel has built settlements across the territory.

discovery.text: The territory is divided into Areas A, B, and C with different levels of control.

twist.text: Maps of the West Bank look like a patchwork quilt—no continuous Palestinian territory exists.

climax.text: The border that would define a Palestinian state has never been agreed upon.

punchline.text: A border that doesn't exist shapes millions of lives.

quiz.question: Since when has the West Bank been under Israeli occupation?
